prompt: What is the difference between Vulkan and ROCm?
notes: Measured against the running llama-server (DynamicUser isolates model dir). n-gpu-layers=12 (Renoir safe limit). Full 41-layer offload causes ErrorDeviceLost on this APU.

vulkan.backend_notes: Partial offload (12 layers). Stable. CPU carries the remaining 29 layers.

rocm.backend_notes: Not benchmarked. hardware_class=amd-apu-renoir promotion_status=blocked. ROCm is not in AMD support matrix for Renoir (gfx90c). Gate Stage 1 would block promotion.

cpu.backend_notes: Not benchmarked standalone. CPU is active for the 29 layers not offloaded in vulkan mode.

baseline_summary.conclusion: Vulkan at 4 tok/s is the safe baseline for this host. ROCm is blocked for this hardware class and cannot be benchmarked. No promotion path exists for amd-apu-renoir.
